description: Analyze the board game collection by calculating entertainment value metrics. Calculate cost-per-play, normalized ratings across different scales, and value scores to identify games worth keeping versus selling.

natural_language.prompt: You have a board game collection spreadsheet with inconsistent data. Calculate cost-per-play (handling games with zero plays), normalize ratings from different scales (1-5 and 1-10) to 0-1 range, and create a value score combining both metrics to identify which games provide the best entertainment value.
